Name: HDR Color Correction
Description: Applies high dynamic range color grading adjustments to the final rendered image. Provides controls for hue shifting, saturation, contrast, and per-channel scaling to achieve cinematic or stylized color balance before tone mapping or final output.

Fields.Name: Color: Hue
Fields.Description: Adjusts the hue of the entire HDR image, rotating all colors around the color wheel.

Fields.Name: Color: Saturation
Fields.Description: Controls overall color saturation. Higher values intensify colors, while lower values desaturate toward grayscale.

Fields.Name: Color: Shift
Fields.Description: Applies a per-channel additive offset (RGBA) to shift the overall color balance of the HDR image.

Fields.Name: Color: Scale
Fields.Description: Applies per-channel multiplicative scaling (RGBA) to adjust intensity and color weighting across the image.

Fields.Name: Color: Value
Fields.Description: Adjusts value/brightness component of the image, controlling overall luminance intensity.

Fields.Name: Contrast
Fields.Description: Controls tonal contrast of the HDR image, increasing or decreasing separation between dark and bright regions.
